name: Oracle
Critical Damage Bonus on You
stats: Hits against you have 12% reduced [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Damage Bonus]

grantedSkill.secDescrText: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you [HitDamage|Hit] enemies with [Melee] [Attack|Attacks] and triggers socketed [Fire] spells on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].

stats: Gains 3 [Energy] per [Power] of enemies you [HitDamage|Hit] with [Melee] [Attack|Attacks], modified by the percentage of the enemy's [AilmentThreshold|Ailment Threshold] the [HitDamage|Hit] will deal

Can only socket [Fire] [Spell|Spells]
Triggers all Socketed [Spell|Spells] and loses all [Energy|Energy] on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy]
Has 10 maximum Energy per 0.1 seconds of base cast time of Socketed [Spell|Spells]

grantedSkill.descrText: Place one or more Skill Gems into this Meta Gem's sockets in the Skills Panel. The socketed Skills will be incorporated into the Meta Gem's effect.

grantedSkill.secDescrText: [Channelling|Channel] to temper your main hand [Melee] [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon]. Each hit of the hammer against the anvil [Empowered|Empowers] subsequent [Attack|Attacks] to Combust when [HitDamage|Hitting] enemies.

stats:
While [Channelling] each strike of the anvil [Empowered|Empowers] your next 3 [Melee] [Attack|Attacks]
[Empowered] [Attack|Attacks] [Trigger] Combust on [HitDamage|Hit]

pages.description: Explode, dealing [Fire] damage in an area.

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Manifest a copy of your main hand [Melee] [MartialWeapon|Martial Weapon] as an immortal [Companion] to fight by your side. In addition to its standard [Strike|Strikes], the Manifested Weapon gains an additional [Attack] depending on its weapon type.

stats:
Minions from this skill have 1% increased [Attack] Speed
per 3 of your [Dexterity]

[Minion|Minions] from this skill have 1% increased Damage
per 1 of your [Strength]

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Consume all stacks of [Jade] to grant [Guard] based off your maximum Life for each [Jade] consumed. You cannot gain [Jade] stacks while you have [Guard].

stats: Gain [Guard] equal to 6% of your maximum life per [Jade] consumed

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Send out a temporal [Nova] to take advantage of enemies' moment of vulnerability. [HitDamage|Hitting] enemies that are [PrimedStun|Primed for Stun], [PrimedElectrocution|Electrocution], or [PrimedFreeze|Freeze] causes a visage of them to appear, lasting as long as the original target would have been affected by the form of [Immobilised|Immobilisation] used to create the visage. A portion of the damage dealt to visages is also dealt to the original.

stats: 10 second delay before enemy can be affected again
60% of damage dealt to temporal visages is also dealt to the original targets

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

flavourText: "In my dreams I see a great warrior, his skin scorched black, his fists aflame."
Lay open your veins, and draw power from your own spilled life.
The irrepressible spirit of the wilds burns within you, roaring to be let loose.
Strength begets respect. There is no simpler law.
Tear my flesh and splinter my bones. You will never break my spirit.

grantedSkill.secDescrText: While active, visages of yourself from alternate timelines will occasionally appear and cast one of your [Spell|Spells] from your first valid [WeaponSets|Weapon Set]. Until the next visage appears, your next cast of the same [Spell] aligns your fate, [Empowered|Empowering] that [Spell]. Visages can only cast damaging, non-[Channelling], non-[Buff] [Spell|Spells] you could cast that have no cooldown.

stats:
Modifiers to Cooldown Recovery Rate also apply to
Visage appearance frequency
25% more Visage frequency per [Spell] Visages could cast

Casting the matching [Spell] before the next
Visage appears [Empowered|Empowers] that [Spell]
[Empowered] Spells deal 30% more damage
